dossier.indications_pursued: Cancer therapy based on single news mention of CAR-T cells for cancer treatment.
dossier.key_differentiators: Claims to have developed a method for creating longer lasting CAR-T cells according to one news report.
dossier.last_significant_event: News report from March 13, 2026 describing a new method for longer lasting CAR-T cells for cancer therapy.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 clinical stage company with in vivo gene therapy approach targeting genetic diseases.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: TSRA-196 is in Phase 1/2 clinical development for Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency in patients with PiZZ genotype and associated lung/liver disease.
dossier.indications_pursued: Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency (AATD) targeting patients with PiZZ genotype presenting with lung and/or liver manifestations.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1/2 clinical trial (NCT07227207) for TSRA-196 in Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T therapy using viral vector delivery approach.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Currently recruiting patients in Phase 1 dose-escalation study (NCT06528301) for lead asset UB-VV111, evaluating safety and antitumor activity.
dossier.indications_pursued: Targeting hematologic malignancies including relapsed/refractory large B-cell lymphoma and chronic lymphocytic leukemia.
dossier.delivery_approach: Viral vector-based in vivo delivery platform, as indicated by the UB-VV111 asset nomenclature.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial NCT06528301 for UB-VV111 in B-cell lymphomas, currently in recruiting status.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage with asset CPTX2309 currently recruiting in healthy volunteers and rheumatoid arthritis patients.
dossier.indications_pursued: Rheumatoid arthritis and systemic lupus erythematosus, focusing on moderate to severe disease presentations.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial NCT06917742 for CPTX2309 in rheumatoid arthritis and systemic lupus erythematosus patients.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage with in vivo CAR-T approach targeting relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Currently recruiting for Phase 1 trial of KLN-1010 evaluating safety, tolerability, and recommended Phase 2 dose.
dossier.indications_pursued: Multiple myeloma in relapse and refractory settings.
dossier.delivery_approach: In vivo CAR-T delivery platform with lead asset KLN-1010.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial NCT07075185 for KLN-1010 in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, currently recruiting patients.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Early-phase clinical development with in vivo CAR-T delivery platform. Company has 4 clinical trials, with one in Early Phase 1 and three others recruiting or not yet recruiting.
dossier.indications_pursued: Hematological malignancies including relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia, and B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Also pursuing refractory autoimmune diseases targeting CD19/BCMA.
dossier.delivery_approach: In vivo CAR-T injection platform with lead assets JY231 for B-cell malignancies and JY232 for multiple myeloma. Dual CD19/BCMA targeting approach for autoimmune indications.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of recruiting for multiple clinical trials including NCT07336823 (JY232 for multiple myeloma) in Early Phase 1 and NCT06890065/NCT06678282 (JY231 for B-cell malignancies).

dossier.stage_and_modality: Clinical stage company with asset HN2301 in recruiting Phase trials for autoimmune diseases.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Limited clinical data available as trials are investigator-initiated with no reported results disclosed.
dossier.indications_pursued: Autoimmune diseases including systemic lupus erythematosus, scleroderma, and refractory myasthenia gravis.
dossier.last_significant_event: Termination of myasthenia gravis trial (NCT06965309) while maintaining active recruitment in lupus/scleroderma study.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Preclinical stage developing in vivo CAR-T therapy approaches
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Demonstrated tumor clearance in mouse models according to recent reporting
dossier.last_significant_event: March 2026 news coverage highlighting preclinical tumor clearance results in mouse studies

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 clinical stage with EN-374 treatment regimen for X-linked chronic granulomatous disease currently recruiting patients.
dossier.indications_pursued: X-linked chronic granulomatous disease with EN-374, and previously pursued sickle cell disease and stem cell mobilization with MGTA-145.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1/2 trial NCT06876363 for EN-374 in X-linked chronic granulomatous disease, currently recruiting participants.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage with multiple in vivo CAR-T programs including SC262 and SC291 assets.
dossier.indications_pursued: Hematologic malignancies including Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma, Large B-cell Lymphoma, and Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia, plus autoimmune diseases including Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
dossier.key_differentiators: Dual application platform with SC291 being tested in both hematologic malignancies and severe autoimmune diseases.
dossier.last_significant_event: Three Phase 1 trials are active but not recruiting, with SC262-101 and SC291-102 studies ongoing as of 2024.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 development with intramuscular delivery approach for EVM14 in solid tumors.
dossier.indications_pursued: Selected solid tumors (EVM14), primary membranous nephropathy (EVER001), and primary IgA nephropathy (Nefecon).
dossier.delivery_approach: Intramuscular administration for EVM14, with oral delivery for BTK inhibitor EVER001.
dossier.key_differentiators: EVM14 designed for combination with pembrolizumab; EVER001 is a highly selective, oral, reversible covalent BTK inhibitor with high kinase selectivity.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1/2 trial NCT07095868 for EVM14 in selected solid tumors with intramuscular delivery.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T therapies using circular RNA delivered via lipid nanoparticles. Currently has two Phase 1 trials recruiting, including one testing CD19 CAR-T for autoimmune diseases.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Limited disclosed data available, with Phase 1 trials recently initiated for ORN252 in healthy volunteers and TI-0032-III in autoimmune patients. No efficacy or safety data publicly reported yet.
dossier.indications_pursued: Targeting autoimmune diseases including systemic lupus erythematosus and Sjogren's syndrome. Also conducting healthy volunteer studies suggesting broader therapeutic development.
dossier.delivery_approach: Uses lipid nanoparticles to deliver circular RNA encoding CD19 chimeric antigen receptor directly to T cells in vivo. Platform appears designed for targeted LNP delivery to specific cell types.
dossier.key_differentiators: Employs circular RNA rather than traditional mRNA for CAR expression, potentially offering improved stability and duration. Focuses on autoimmune applications of CAR-T rather than oncology.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of two Phase 1 clinical trials in 2024, including first-in-human study of in vivo CD19 CAR-T therapy for autoimmune diseases.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 clinical stage company developing CAR-T cell therapy products. Two active recruiting trials for OriCAR-017 in multiple myeloma.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: No clinical data disclosed yet as trials are in recruiting status. Both Phase 1 trials are evaluating safety, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy.
dossier.indications_pursued: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma with focus on plasma cell neoplasms. Both clinical trials target the same indication.
dossier.delivery_approach: Anti-GPRC5D CAR-T cell product delivered as cell therapy. Appears to be traditional ex vivo engineered CAR-T approach rather than in vivo delivery.
dossier.key_differentiators: Targets GPRC5D antigen for multiple myeloma treatment. Limited data available to assess differentiation versus other GPRC5D-targeting approaches.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of first US clinical study (NCT06271252) for OriCAR-017 in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma patients.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Multiple Phase 1/2 trials with ex vivo CAR-T therapies across solid tumors and hematologic malignancies. The company has at least one commercially available product (zevor-cel) requiring long-term follow-up studies.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Advanced gastric/pancreatic cancer trials (CT041 targeting claudin18.2) have progressed to active but not recruiting status in Phase 1b/2 studies. Post-marketing Phase IV study initiated for zevor-cel in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.
dossier.indications_pursued: Solid tumors including gastric adenocarcinoma, pancreatic cancer, and hepatocellular carcinoma, plus hematologic malignancies including relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.
dossier.delivery_approach: Ex vivo autologous CAR-T cell manufacturing and infusion approach across multiple asset programs.
dossier.key_differentiators: Claudin18.2 targeting platform (CT041) for solid tumors and multiple distinct CAR-T assets (CT011, CT041, CABA-201/zevor-cel) across different indications.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of CT011 Phase 1b trial for hepatocellular carcinoma post-surgical resection (NCT06560827, recruiting status as of trial registry).

dossier.stage_and_modality: Early-stage company with assets in Phase I (IMV101, IMV102) and Phase III (IMC002) development. No clear indication of in vivo delivery approach from available data.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Phase III trial (NCT07103668) for IMC002 in CLDN18.2-positive gastric adenocarcinoma represents most advanced program. No efficacy data disclosed for any assets.
dossier.indications_pursued: Targeting hematologic malignancies including relapsed/refractory B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma and multiple myeloma. Also pursuing solid tumors with CLDN18.2-positive gastric adenocarcinoma.
dossier.last_significant_event: Three clinical trials currently recruiting across different indications, with Phase III trial for IMC002 in gastric cancer being most advanced.
